jobs.title: Concept Outsource Lead
jobs.content: <div class="content-intro"><h2>WHAT MAKES US EPIC?</h2><p>At the core of Epic's success are talented, passionate people. Epic prides itself on creating a collaborative, welcoming, and creative environment.</p></div><p>You'll partner with our internal art directors and external outsource studios to ship the visual identity for Fortnite's seasonal arcs.</p>

jobs.title: Partnerships Director - Sports & Talent
jobs.content: <h2><strong>Partnerships Director - Sports & Talent</strong></h2><p>At Epic Games, we partner with the leading sports leagues, athletes, and entertainment talent to ship the in-game collaborations that anchor Fortnite's metaverse roadmap. The Partnerships team operates at the intersection of game design, IP licensing, and brand strategy.</p><p>You'll lead the sports and talent partnerships function across the Cary, North Carolina HQ.</p>
